case_title: MIRO MAJETIC VS. CAM SAU VOONG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65.00) SERVED MAR-18-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VOONG, CAM SAU
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MAJETIC, MIRO AS TO DEFENDANT VOONG, CAM SAU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAJETIC, MIRO AS TO DEFENDANT VOONG, CAM SAU
TRIAL RESET TO APR-23-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-05-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S SON LOC VOONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE, CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON HIS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SINCE PLAINTIFF APPARENTLY WAS NOT A PARTY TO THE CONTRACT FOR REPAIR OF THE BUILDING'S ROOF. HE DOES NOT HAVE STANDING TO SUE DEFENDANT.
